title: Split Two Strings to Make Palindrome
titleCn: 分割两个字符串得到回文串

testcases.input: a = "x", b = "y" Output: true Explaination: If either a or b are palindromes the answer is true since you can split in the following way: aprefix = "", asuffix = "x" bprefix = "", bsuffix = "y" Then, aprefix + bsuffix = "" + "y" = "y", which is a palindrome.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explaination: If either a or b are palindromes the answer is true since you can split in the following way: aprefix = "", asuffix = "x" bprefix = "", bsuffix = "y" Then, aprefix + bsuffix = "" + "y" = "y", which is a palindrome.

testcases.input: a = "ulacfd", b = "jizalu" Output: true Explaination: Split them at index 3: aprefix = "ula", asuffix = "cfd" bprefix = "jiz", bsuffix = "alu" Then, aprefix + bsuffix = "ula" + "alu" = "ulaalu", which is a palindrome.
testcases.expectedOutput: true Explaination: Split them at index 3: aprefix = "ula", asuffix = "cfd" bprefix = "jiz", bsuffix = "alu" Then, aprefix + bsuffix = "ula" + "alu" = "ulaalu", which is a palindrome.
